pages.subject: 01HSUBJGLOBEX0000000000001
pages.title: Globex Corp
pages.body: Globex Corp, also known as Globex, is a multinational conglomerate headquartered in Springfield. [01HXINBOX0000000000000000] In 2021 it acquired Initech, expanding into enterprise software. [01HXINBOX0000000000000001]

stale_notes.subject: 01HSUBJINITECH000000000001
stale_notes.note: Initech is described on its page as independent, but Globex acquired it in 2021.
